subcodes.first_line: The deniers and opposers among the people of God have raised the banner of hypocrisy and utter calumnies, the like of which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حزب الله معرضین و منکرین علم نفاق برافراختند و بمفتریاتی متکلمند که شبه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @rejection, opposition and persecution
